channel.title: Lucas Chen's Archie
channel.description: Recent content on Lucas Chen's Archie

item.title: Java Microbenchmark Harness(JMH)
item.description:
JMH is a Java harness for building, running, and analysing nano/micro/milli/macro benchmarks written in Java and other languages targeting the JVM.

JMH 是一个 Java 工具，用于构建、运行和分析用 Java 和其他针对 JVM 的语言编写的纳/微米/毫/宏观基准测试。

item.title: OGNL 语言指南(OGNL Language Guide)
item.description: 翻译自 Apache 官网 OGNL 的语言指南。

item.title: 前端模块化(Front End Modularization)
item.description:
前端模块化详解

包含以下部分：

  1. 模块化的理解
  2. 模块化的规范
  3. CommonJS, AMD, ES6

item.title: Maven
item.description:
Maven 相关知识总结。

包含以下部分：

  1. 配置
  2. 核心概念
  3. POM
  4. 命令行操作
  5. 依赖
  6. 继承

item.title: Redis 集群(Redis Cluster)
item.description: 简述如何使用 docker-compose 搭建 3 主 3 从的 Redis 集群。

item.title: Nginx 基础(Nginx Basic)
item.description:
How to use nginx easily.

The following sections are included:

  1. Install
  2. Configuration
  3. Virtual host
  4. Reverse proxy
  5. Load balancing
  6. Dynamic-Static Separation
  7. UrlRewrite

item.title: 初始化服务器(Initializing Server)
item.description:
After reinstalling the system, initialize the centos 7 system.

The following sections are included

  1. IP address, static IP, host name, host file
  2. Firewall Service
  3. epel source and yum source
  4. user and assign permissions
  5. Common tool.(the_silver_searcher, tmux, axel, wget, curl, zsh, oh my zsh, p10k, vim)

item.title: About
item.description: It’s been a long time since I bought a server and domain name, and I’m taking advantage of this New Year to learn about nginx and how to do service forwarding. Cooperate with Hugo to generate a static web page, which uses the theme of archie to build a personal website. The plan here is to store configuration files and organize notes. Personally, I prefer to organize and store things I see on the Internet.

item.title: 中文技术文档的写作规范(Document Style Guide)
item.description:
中文技术文档的写作规范

包含以下部分：

  1. 标题
  2. 文本
  3. 段落
  4. 数值
  5. 标点符号
  6. 文档体系
